# Atom

## Tags
atomic, nuclear, physics, particle, element, molecule, electricity, energy, chemistry

## Categories
science

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/atom)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Atom;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Atom { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
